data.title: Granite to lead $157 million project for 22nd Street Widening and Bridge Replacement in Tucson, funded by city, regional authority, and $25 million RAISE Grant.
data.description: Granite, partnering with Traylor Bros., Inc., has been chosen by the City of Tucson for the 22nd Street Widening and Bridge Replacement Project in Tucson, Arizona. This project, valued at $157 million, will be financed by the City of Tucson, the Regional Transportation Authority, and a $25 million RAISE Grant. It will be part of Granite's fourth-quarter CAP for 2025. The initiative involves the reconstruction of 22nd Street from Kino Parkw.

data.title: Franklin Street Properties Corp. announces tax composition of 2025 distributions. Shareholders advised to consult with personal tax advisors.
data.description: Franklin Street Properties Corp. (NYSE American: FSP) disclosed the tax breakdown of its 2025 distributions in Wakefield, Mass. Shareholders should seek advice from their tax advisors regarding the tax implications of FSP distributions. The Common Stock (CUSIP # 35471R106) for 2025 had a total distribution with figures as follows: Total Unrecaptured Section 2025 Ordinary, Qualified, and Capital Gains.

data.title: United Rentals, Inc. to hold Q4 and FY 2025 conference call on January 29, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. (ET), accessible at unitedrentals.com.
data.description: United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI) will host their Q4 and full-year 2025 conference call on January 29, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will feature CEO Matt Flannery and CFO Ted Grace. To participate, listeners can access the live audio webcast on unitedrentals.com, with the option for archived playback until the subsequent earnings call. Alternatively, participants can join by dialing 800-420-1271 (international: 785-424-1634).

data.title: Sunset Pier 94 Studios in Manhattan leases 70,000 sq ft to Paramount Television Studios for Dexter: Resurrection.
data.description: In New York, Vornado Realty Trust (NYSE: VNO), Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc. (NYSE: HPP), and Blackstone Real Estate disclosed that Paramount Television Studios, part of Sunset Pier 94 Studios, Manhattan’s initial dedicated studio complex, inked the inaugural lease before the facility’s launch. The lease covers 70,000 square feet for shooting the next season of Showtime's Dexter: Resurr.

data.title: Urban Edge Properties in NYC announced the tax treatment of 2025 dividend distributions. No specific numbers mentioned.
data.description: Urban Edge Properties, a real estate investment trust, has disclosed the tax treatment for its 2025 dividend distributions. Shareholders received $0.35 per share, resulting in $0.16 being classified as ordinary income and $0.19 as return of capital. This information will be essential for investors during tax season.

data.title: Eagle Materials to release Q3 fiscal 2026 results on Jan 29, 2026. Conference call at 8:30 am ET. Visit ir.eaglematerials.com.
data.description: Dallas-based Eagle Materials Inc. (NYSE: EXP) is scheduled to announce its financial results for Q3 of fiscal year 2026 ending on December 31, 2025, on Thursday, January 29, 2026. The information will be disclosed before the NYSE opens. Additionally, an investor conference call will take place on the same day at 8:30 am Eastern Time (7:30 am Central Time). Interested individuals can access the call via webcast and slide presentation at ir.eaglematerials.com/webcasts-presentations. The slides will be available for download during the call.

data.title: Rayonier declares 2025 dividends totaling $2.49 per share, paid quarterly, classified as 100% Capital Gain.
data.description: Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) in WILDLIGHT, Fla., disclosed the tax treatment of the 2025 dividend distributions for its Common Stock CUSIP 754907103. The total dividend per share was $2.49, with payments made as follows: $0.2725 on March 31, 2025; $0.2725 on June 30, 2025; $0.2725 on September 30, 2025; $1.40 on December 12, 2025; and $0.2725 on December 31, 2025. This $2.49 dividend per share is categorized as 100% Capital Gain for income tax purposes.

data.title: JBG SMITH (NYSE: JBGS) reports taxable composition of 2025 distributions. Consult tax advisor for details.
data.description: Real estate company JBG SMITH disclosed the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions on common shares in Washington, DC. The allocations to be reported on Form 1099-DIV are outlined in a provided table. Shareholders are advised to seek guidance from a tax advisor on the federal, state, and local income tax implications of these distributions. JBG SMITH (NYSE: JBGS) is known for its mixed-use properties, and the information relates to its operations in the Washington, DC market.

data.title: Lovense impresses at CES 2026, leading sex tech innovation with a focus on normalizing intimacy talks.
data.description: At the Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas on January 15, 2026, Lovense showcased its dedication to revolutionizing the intimacy tech sector. Known as a top player in the sex tech field, Lovense is focused on advancing conversations about the intersection of intimacy and technology. Their presence at CES 2026 highlights their significant role in shaping the industry's future.

data.title: Coinbase CEO urges Congress for fair competition laws, demands 3.8% stablecoin rewards. Banks accused of stifling competition.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong, of NASDAQ: COIN, called for Congress to implement laws promoting fair competition after the delay of a cryptocurrency market structure bill. Speaking on CNBC, Armstrong stressed the need for a "level playing field" to enable all American companies to compete and innovate without unfair advantages. He criticized the potential for banks to stifle competition and highlighted the importance of consumers being able to earn 3.8% interest on stablecoins. Armstrong emphasized the right for people in the U.S. to maximize their earning potential from their assets. The full details of the story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AKG and Ca-AKG of Xin Tianhe received US Self-GRAS certification on Jan. 7, 2026, meeting FDA standards.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 15, 2026, Xin Tianhe Biotechnology's AKG and Ca-AKG products underwent a successful Self-GRAS evaluation on January 7, 2026, meeting US FDA GRAS standards. These products were approved, marking the first time domestic fermentation products achieved this recognition.
